name: wiki
description: Expose your SiYuan wiki as native MCP tools — search, get, journal, ADR, push.

siyuan_token.title: SiYuan API Token
siyuan_token.description: Found in SiYuan → Settings → About → API token

default_notebook.title: Default Notebook
default_notebook.description: Notebook name override. Kosongkan untuk auto-detect dari nama project folder (e.g. camis-api-native → camis-api-native-wiki).
